name: finance-review
description: Review the research memo (breadth then depth) and fix findings until no Blocker or Major remains.
rubric: The breadth pass scanned the current draft for missing sections, orphan figures, and unsupported claims.
The depth pass returned an explicit verdict for each of the five gates (Data Provenance, Assumption Traceability, Valuation Coherence, Risk & Disclosure, Mandate Fit).
Zero Blocker findings remain (e.g., an invented source, a figure that does not reconcile, a missing disclosure).
Zero Major findings remain (e.g., an assumption in the narrative that the model contradicts).
The final recommendation is consistent with the stated mandate and risk profile.
fixPrompt: Each iteration: (1) breadth-review the current memo for completeness and internal consistency; (2) depth-review by issuing a verdict on each gate in gates.md; (3) if no Blocker/Major findings remain and validate-research is green, converge — report Minor/Nit findings without iterating; (4) otherwise fix the Blocker/Major findings in the memo and re-run validate-research before the next pass.
guardrails: Findings are fixed in the memo, not argued away — a gate failure means the analysis changes, not the verdict text.
Do not soften a risk or drop a disclosure to clear a gate.
Re-review the fixes themselves each iteration, not just the prior findings list.
onExhausted: Stop. Report the remaining Blocker/Major findings, the fix attempted for each, and recommend human analyst review or a return to the Thesis stage.
